source_units.text_raw:
Uses as permitted in the R-4A Zone subject to the Regulations for Permitted Uses for the R-4A Zone and excluding the following uses:
Semi-detached Dwellings; and
Duplex Dwellings.
Uses permitted in the Institutional (I) Zone, subject to the Regulations for permitted uses for the I Zone and excluding the following uses:
Community Care Facility; and
Nursing Home.
Commercial Uses permitted in the MUC Zone, including those permitted in the ER-MUVC Zone, subject to the following C-3 regulations.
